evals.prompt: I just fixed a bug where the CDISC sync was crashing when the external API returned an unexpected version format. The fix is in backend/app/services/cdisc_sync.py and backend/app/api/routers/admin.py. Please commit the backend changes.
evals.expected_output: Should detect backend-only changes, run ruff check, stage only backend/ files, craft a message like 'fix(backend): handle unexpected version format in CDISC sync' with imperative mood, include Co-Authored-By trailer.

assertions.text: Runs ruff check as pre-commit step
Skips the .tmp temp file from staging
Uses imperative mood in commit message
Does not use git add -A or git add .
Stages only the two specified backend files

evals.expected_output: Should gather context, detect both backend and frontend changed, suggest splitting if both have meaningful changes, run appropriate lint/type checks, clean temp files, craft conventional commit with scope matching changed directory.

assertions.text: Detects changes in both backend/ and frontend/
Suggests splitting into separate commits for monorepo
Plans to run ruff check for backend
Plans to run tsc for frontend

evals.prompt: I added a new Zustand store for managing RBAC permissions and updated the MenuProvider component to use it. Files changed: frontend/src/features/rbac/stores/permissionStore.ts and frontend/src/features/menu/MenuProvider.tsx. Also there's a .env.local that got modified but I don't want that committed.
evals.expected_output: Should detect frontend-only changes, run tsc --noEmit, stage only the two .ts/.tsx files (NOT .env.local), warn about the .env file being modified but not staged, craft message like 'feat(frontend): add RBAC permission store and integrate with MenuProvider'.
